title: dupatya tenuis
intro: Dupatya tenuis, also known as Indian valerian or red valerian, is a plant species in the Valerianaceae family, characterized by its red flowers and edible roots. The medicinal properties of Dupatya tenuis include its sedative and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to the presence of valerenic acid and valepotriates. The health benefits of this plant include relief from insomnia, anxiety, and stress, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation. Dupatya tenuis can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or capsules, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote relaxation and improve sleep quality.
